name: formatRelativeTime
description: Formats dates as human-readable relative time strings (e.g., '2 hours ago', 'in 3 days') using Intl.RelativeTimeFormat.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying recent timestamps (posts, comments, updates).
Automatically selects appropriate time unit (seconds, minutes, hours, days, etc.).
Returns 'just now' for very recent times (< 60 seconds).

params.name: date
params.description: Date to format as relative time.

return_value.description: Human-readable relative time string or 'Invalid date' for invalid inputs.

Dont: Don't use for future dates far ahead
